name: Court Subpoena Notice
description: Fake court subpoena to create fear and urgency. Targets professionals.
subject: URGENT: Court subpoena issued in your name - Case #2026-CV-8847
text:
NOTICE OF SUBPOENA

{{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}},

A subpoena has been issued in your name in the matter of Case #2026-CV-8847. You are required to appear as a witness and produce certain documents.

Case Number: 2026-CV-8847
Court: Superior Court
Hearing Date: {{.Date}}
Service Type: Duces Tecum

View full subpoena and instructions: {{.URL}}

Failure to respond to a lawful subpoena may result in contempt of court charges, fines up to $1,000, or imprisonment.

If you believe you have received this notice in error, please contact the court immediately via the link above.

County Clerk's Office
html:
OFFICIAL COURT NOTICE

Notice of Subpoena

{{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}},

A subpoena has been issued in your name in the matter of Case #2026-CV-8847. You are required to appear as a witness and produce certain documents.

Case Number: 2026-CV-8847
Court: Superior Court
Hearing Date: {{.Date}}
Service Type: Duces Tecum

VIEW SUBPOENA

WARNING: Failure to respond to a lawful subpoena may result in contempt of court charges, fines up to $1,000, or imprisonment.
County Clerk's Office

name: GDPR Compliance Policy Update
description: Mandatory GDPR policy acknowledgement driving users to a credential-harvesting form.
subject: Action required: Acknowledge updated {{.OrgName}} GDPR policy
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

{{.OrgName}} has updated its GDPR data processing policy effective {{.Date}}. All employees are required to review and acknowledge the updated policy within 72 hours.

Failure to acknowledge the policy will result in your email account being temporarily restricted until compliance is confirmed.

Review and acknowledge: {{.URL}}

Thank you for your cooperation in maintaining {{.OrgName}}'s commitment to data privacy.

{{.OrgName}} Legal & Compliance Team
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

Updated GDPR Policy - Acknowledgement Required

Dear {{.FirstName}},

{{.OrgName}} has updated its GDPR data processing policy effective {{.Date}}. All employees are required to review and acknowledge the updated policy within 72 hours.

Important: Failure to acknowledge the policy will result in your email account being temporarily restricted until compliance is confirmed.

Review & Acknowledge Policy

Thank you for your cooperation in maintaining {{.OrgName}}'s commitment to data privacy.

{{.OrgName}} Legal & Compliance Team
{{.Tracker}}

name: DMCA Copyright Infringement Notice
description: DMCA takedown demanding immediate action, targeting content creators and marketers.
subject: DMCA Takedown Notice - Immediate Action Required
text:
DMCA TAKEDOWN NOTICE

To: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}, {{.OrgName}}

We represent the copyright holder of certain intellectual property that we believe is being infringed on materials published by {{.OrgName}}. This notice is issued pursuant to 17 U.S.C. 512(c)(3).

Infringement reference: DMCA-2026-9237
Affected URLs: See attached report

View the full infringement report and respond: {{.URL}}

You have 48 hours to respond to this notice. Failure to respond may result in formal legal proceedings and a request for monetary damages.

Barnett & Associates, LLP
Intellectual Property Law
html:
BARNETT & ASSOCIATES, LLP

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY LAW

DMCA TAKEDOWN NOTICE

To: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}, {{.OrgName}}

We represent the copyright holder of certain intellectual property that we believe is being infringed on materials published by {{.OrgName}}. This notice is issued pursuant to 17 U.S.C. § 512(c)(3).

Infringement reference: DMCA-2026-9237
Affected URLs: See attached report

VIEW INFRINGEMENT REPORT

48-hour deadline: Failure to respond may result in formal legal proceedings and a request for monetary damages.
Barnett & Associates, LLP • Attorneys at Law
{{.Tracker}}

name: IRS Tax Notice CP2000
description: IRS notice about a tax discrepancy - classic seasonal phishing lure.
subject: IRS Notice CP2000: Discrepancy in your tax return
text:
INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE
Notice CP2000

Taxpayer: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}

Our records show that your tax return does not match the income information reported to us by your employer or other payers.

Proposed amount owed: $1,847.52
Response due: 30 days

Review notice and respond: {{.URL}}

If you do not respond, we will assume the proposed changes are correct and bill you for the amount owed plus interest and penalties.

Internal Revenue Service
html:
INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE

Notice CP2000

Taxpayer: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}

Our records show that your tax return does not match the income information reported to us by your employer or other payers.

Proposed amount owed: $1,847.52
Response due: 30 days

Review Notice & Respond

If you do not respond, we will assume the proposed changes are correct and bill you for the amount owed plus interest and penalties.

Internal Revenue Service • Department of the Treasury

name: Mandatory Security Training Overdue
description: Compliance training overdue notice - ironic lure often used by real attackers.
subject: OVERDUE: {{.OrgName}} mandatory security training
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Our records indicate that you have not completed your mandatory annual {{.OrgName}} security awareness training. This training is required for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance.

Due date: {{.Date}}
Status: OVERDUE
Duration: ~15 minutes

Complete training now: {{.URL}}

Failure to complete the training within the next 48 hours will be reported to your manager and HR, and may result in temporary suspension of system access.

{{.OrgName}} Compliance Team

name: HIPAA Breach Notification
description: HIPAA breach notification targeting healthcare staff with urgency.
subject: URGENT: Possible HIPAA breach - your action required
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

As required under HIPAA Section 164.410, we are notifying you that a potential breach involving Protected Health Information (PHI) may have affected records you accessed.

Incident ID: HB-2026-0409
Investigation status: ACTIVE
Your action: Complete the affected-user acknowledgement form

Access the secure form: {{.URL}}

This form must be completed within 24 hours. Failure to comply may affect your clinical credentials and mandatory reporting obligations.

All communications regarding this incident must be treated as confidential per HIPAA Section 164.514.

{{.OrgName}} Privacy Office
html:
CONFIDENTIAL - HIPAA BREACH NOTIFICATION

Dear {{.FirstName}},

As required under HIPAA Section 164.410, we are notifying you that a potential breach involving Protected Health Information (PHI) may have affected records you accessed.

Incident ID: HB-2026-0409
Investigation status: ACTIVE
Your action: Complete affected-user acknowledgement form

ACCESS SECURE FORM

24-hour deadline. Failure to comply may affect your clinical credentials and mandatory reporting obligations.

All communications regarding this incident must be treated as confidential per HIPAA Section 164.514.

{{.OrgName}} Privacy Office
{{.Tracker}}

name: SEC Filing Notice
description: SEC filing review notification targeting finance and executive staff.
subject: SEC filing review - {{.OrgName}} Form 10-K preliminary comments
text:
{{.FirstName}},

The Division of Corporation Finance has completed its preliminary review of {{.OrgName}}'s Form 10-K annual report. The review identified several areas that require clarification before final acceptance.

Filing: Form 10-K
Filer: {{.OrgName}}
Review status: Comments issued
Response period: 10 business days

View the comment letter (SEC EDGAR): {{.URL}}

Your prompt response will help ensure {{.OrgName}}'s continued compliance with the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

SEC Division of Corporation Finance
100 F Street, NE
Washington, DC 20549

name: Anti-Bribery Policy Acknowledgement
description: Annual anti-bribery and corruption policy acknowledgement lure.
subject: Annual FCPA/UK Bribery Act acknowledgement required
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

As part of our annual ethics and compliance review, all {{.OrgName}} employees must acknowledge the updated Anti-Bribery and Corruption Policy.

This policy reflects requirements under:
- Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA)
- UK Bribery Act 2010
- OECD Anti-Bribery Convention

Acknowledge policy: {{.URL}}

Employees who do not acknowledge within 5 business days will be flagged for mandatory in-person training and a supervisory review.

{{.OrgName}} Ethics & Compliance
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

Annual Anti-Bribery Acknowledgement

Dear {{.FirstName}},

As part of our annual ethics and compliance review, all {{.OrgName}} employees must acknowledge the updated Anti-Bribery and Corruption Policy.

This policy reflects requirements under:

  • Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA)
  • UK Bribery Act 2010
  • OECD Anti-Bribery Convention

Acknowledge Policy

Employees who do not acknowledge within 5 business days will be flagged for mandatory in-person training and a supervisory review.

{{.OrgName}} Ethics & Compliance
